name: Referral Request - Generic
description: Cold email asking for a referral from someone you do not know directly
html_content:
Hello {{receiver_name}},

Apologies for the cold email — I'll keep it brief.

I'm Tejas, an SDE-1 at Interface.ai with 2 years of experience (including internship) at YC-backed and well-funded startups, including one backed by WhatsApp's co-founder. I studied at IIIT Gwalior and have a strong background in distributed systems, open-source contributions, and problem solving (Knight on LeetCode, 1880+ rating).

I noticed {{company_name}} is hiring for the {{ROLE}} role and feel my experience could be a good fit. If you're comfortable, would you be open to referring me? I've attached my resume so you can take a look — no worries at all if it doesn't feel right.

Really appreciate you reading this far. Thanks!

Tejas Thombare
